title: RFE: `podman update` should have `--latest` flag
body:
### Feature request description

Most of our commands have a `--latest` option, so you don't need to remember the name of the most recent container. There's no reason it can't have this.

### Suggest potential solution

`podman update --latest ...` should work instead of `podman update ... myContainer`

### Have you considered any alternatives?

A clear and concise description of any alternative solutions or features you've considered.

### Additional context

Add any other context or screenshots about the feature request here.

comments.body: I would like to work on this issue.
